zh.Hailsham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可海爾善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Fiennes於大約1395年出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，他的父親William Fiennes II39歲，母親Elizabeth Batisford32歲。他於大約1424年與Joan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年7月4日在英國倫敦享年56歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

zh-hans.Hailsham, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可海爾善姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir James Fiennes于大约1395年出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，他的父亲William Fiennes II39岁，母亲Elizabeth Batisford32岁。他于大约1424年与Joan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年7月4日在英国倫敦享年56岁，埋葬在英国倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Fiennes was born about 1395, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, his father, William Fiennes II, was 39 and his mother, Elizabeth Batisford, was 32. He married Joan about 1424. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 4 July 1450, in London, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Fiennes est né environ 1395, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Fiennes II, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Batisford, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Joan environ 1424. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1450, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Fiennes um 1395 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fiennes II 39 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Batisford 32. Er hat um 1424 Joan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1450 im Alter von 56 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Fiennes è nato il circa 1395 nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William Fiennes II, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Batisford, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Joan circa 1424. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 luglio 1450, nel London, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a London, England.

ja.Hailsham, Sussex, England: イギリスイギリススセックスヘイルシャム
ja.Herstmonceux, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Fiennesが約1395年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父William Fiennes IIは39歳，母Elizabeth Batisfordは32歳であった。約1424年にJoanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年7月4日にイギリスロンドンで56歳で死去し，イギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Fiennes(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fiennes II(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Batisford(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1424년 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 7월 4일 영국 런던에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

mn.Hailsham, Sussex, England: Hailsham, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fiennes II, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Batisford, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan aproximadamente 1424. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de julho de 1450, em London, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Fiennes родился около 1395 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fiennes II было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Batisford, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan около 1424 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 июля 1450 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1395, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Fiennes II, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Batisford, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Joan aproximadamente 1424. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de julio de 1450, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra.
